'''Orinackra''' was a prison [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Description==
[[File:Orinackramission.png|thumb|left|250px|View of the interior of the Imperial Detention Center.]]
Orinackra surface was a barren wasteland with its most distinct features being the large valleys made of stone.<ref name="DF">''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''</ref> This feature made it a perfect planet for prisoners since the valleys were large mazes with many dead ends.

An outcropping had a [[shuttle carrier]] station built, on which one could approach the entrance to the [[Imperial Detention Center]]. Nearby was a valley where ships could land.<ref name="DF" />

==History==
[[File:Kyle_with_guns.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Kyle Katarn daringly undertook a rescue mission during the Galactic Civil War.]]
In the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained the [[Imperial Detention Center]] there.<ref name="DF" /> Though not as famous, Orinackra was an easy comparison to more famous prisons such as [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] and [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]].

[[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], an Imperial general who had attempted to defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Dark Trooper Project|Dark Trooper crisis]], was captured on the ''[[Arc Hammer]]'' for leaking valuable information to the rebels. He was put in the facility awaiting execution.

As the information given by Madine was essential to the Alliance, the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' was sent there, and [[agent/Legends|agent]] [[Kyle Katarn]] daringly [[Mission to Orinackra|rescued]] him.<ref name="DF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Orinackra first appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''. An entire level of the game was dedicated to the locale, although players only briefly moved about the planet's surface, as the majority of the level took place inside an Imperial detention facility.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster]]''
